name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷GG Marmont Quilted Card Holder. Like the various shades of taupe, Gucci's enduring designs introduce new models every season. In the 2025 Spring/Summer collection, taupe adds a fresh, enduring vibrancy to the new leather goods collection. This classic GG Marmont Card Holder is presented with a vibrant touch. Taupe quilted V-shaped leather, gold-tone hardware, cloud print fabric lining with double-G, twelve card slots, three bill slots, flap closure.
name_cn:

Taupe quilted V-shaped leather, gold-tone hardware, cloud print fabric lining with double-G, twelve card slots, three bill slots, flap closure.
Model: 443436.
Size: 19(W) x 10.5(H) x 3cm(D)
Color: Taupe/Original leather.
Italian creation
